Business Profile

Ricky R
Designs

Premium signage and branding solutions — transforming brand visions into powerful visual identities across Southern Africa.

01

Who We
Are

Ricky R Designs is a professional signage and branding company specialising in the design, production, and installation of high-quality custom signage and branded solutions. Founded in March 2024 by Ricardo, the company operates from its base in Centurion, Gauteng, South Africa, serving clients across multiple provinces and extending its services into neighbouring countries.

02

Mission &
Vision

Our Vision

To establish Ricky R Designs as a leading signage and branding company, widely recognised for its commitment to creativity, quality craftsmanship, and consistently reliable service delivery.

Our Mission

To provide innovative and high-quality signage and branding solutions that empower businesses to strengthen their visual identity, differentiate themselves in the market, and attract their ideal customers.

03

Products &
Services

Ricky R Designs offers a comprehensive range of signage and branding services, structured across five specialist service divisions to meet the diverse needs of our clients.

04

History &
Background

2020 – 2021 · The Beginning

The foundation of Ricky R Designs was laid during Ricardo's tenure at SVR Bus & Coach Repairs, where he identified a gap when the company's existing signage supplier failed to meet expectations and the professional relationship was terminated. Recognising an opportunity, Ricardo approached the company's Director with a proposal to acquire the necessary equipment in-house and take ownership of all signage and branding operations — a proposal that was accepted and marked the start of his professional journey in the industry.

2021 · Skill Development

From early 2021, Ricardo committed to continuous professional development, dedicating significant time to mastering vinyl application techniques. Through consistent practice and hands-on experience, he steadily refined his craft and built the technical expertise that would become the cornerstone of Ricky R Designs.

March 2024 · Official Launch

Drawing on years of industry experience and a growing portfolio of successful projects, Ricardo made the strategic decision to launch Ricky R Designs as an independent signage and branding company — bringing professional-grade solutions directly to businesses of all sizes.

Key Milestones & Notable Partnerships

🚌

Curro Schools (Ongoing)
Since 2022, Ricky R Designs has provided continuous vehicle branding services for Curro, completing over 100 branded vehicles — ranging from car wraps to large bus decals — across multiple provinces and the broader franchise network. This includes Curro Select schools such as Heron Bridge, Waterstone, Grant Leigh, and much more.

🚍

Areyeng Buses
Successfully completed the full vehicle branding of their bus fleet, demonstrating the company's capacity to deliver large-scale, high-impact branding projects.

🏢

PNA Vehicle Branding
Delivered a comprehensive vehicle branding solution for PNA, further reinforcing the company's reputation for quality and professionalism within the retail sector.

🌍

International Reach
Ricky R Designs has proudly served clients beyond South African borders, having successfully completed projects for customers in Zambia, Botswana, and Lesotho — reflecting the company's growing regional footprint.

09

Target
Market

Ricky R Designs serves a broad spectrum of clients across both the private and corporate sectors, with a particular focus on organisations seeking to establish or enhance their visual brand presence.

Small to Large Businesses seeking professional branding and signage solutions
Startups & Entrepreneurs looking to build a strong brand identity from the ground up
Corporate Clients requiring large-scale, consistent, and high-quality branding executions
